_meta.built_note: build tip inherited from REGENERATED slot_paths.json (_meta.built_date) and stack_menu.json (_meta.built=2026-07-02); no datetime call
_meta.adp_snapshot: Underdog ADP via ffdataroma_draft_guide_export/ffdataroma/csv/underdog-adp.csv (top-216 coverage 96.8% per slot_paths._meta); adj_rank from flag_ranks.json
_meta.grounding: Every round primary target is drawn from that slot/round decision zone in the REGENERATED slot_paths.json (corrected team tiers + fixed turn-pick filter). Late rounds (14-18) with no forced target are shown as best-available POOLS. Stack pieces prefer value_flag pieces; capital-price honesty is covered separately in _meta.capital_honesty — value_flag does NOT assert an at-or-below-ADP price.
_meta.shape_rules: Target 2-3 QB / 5-6 RB / 6-7 WR / 2-3 TE over 18; HARD floor RB1<=R7; QBs R5+ (mostly R6-10); TEs late (R10-13) except explicit elite-TE-leverage variants.

legend.rounds[r].primary: list of grounded target(s) for the round (a pool for late rounds)
legend.rounds[r].pivots: 1-2 grounded fallbacks in the same zone
legend.rounds[r].stack_pick: true if this pick is a designated stack piece (QB or same-team pass-catcher)
legend.checkpoints: position counts at R5/R7/R9/R13/R18 + rb1_round/qb1_round/te1_round + floors_ok

_meta.value_flag_definition: value_flag / MODEL EDGE = the model (flag_ranks adj_rank) ranks the player at or above his market rank AT THAT PICK. It measures model edge, NOT draft capital: a value_flag pick can still be slotted well ahead of ADP.

capital_honesty.claim_correction: Earlier meta implied the WINNING_STRUCTURE at-or-below-price stacking rule was satisfied via value_flag. That flag measures MODEL-RANK vs market-rank, not draft capital. Measured on this board, designated stack pieces are slotted a mean +5.2 picks AHEAD of ADP (n=135 stack picks) — largely structural to snake slot geometry (a slot's pick either precedes or trails a player's ADP; zones only expose gettable players), but it is NOT "at price" in the capital sense the research measures.
capital_honesty.renderer_note: render_strategy_board.py now displays a per-pick CAPITAL GAP chip (pick_number - ADP) with a reach warning on stack picks taken >6 picks early.
capital_honesty.could_wait: 23 of 63 stack-QB slots could plausibly wait a round (QB >=50% available at the next pick, p_next>=0.5 in slot_paths). A drafter SHOULD wait where the room allows — the round listed is the LAST safe window, not a command to reach.
